title: Spicy Crusty Bread
description: A flavorful bread recipe with a spicy kick and a crunchy crust. Perfect for snacking or serving with soups and stews.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, spicy, and crusty. Mix well.
Gradually add water to the dry ingredients, stirring until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Shape the dough into a round or oblong shape.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
